documentation_impact.rationale: The task changed governance enforcement and added a new handbook contract surface.

deferred_items.rationale: Schema-level validation and CI replay tests are deferred to the next hardening pass.

policy_alignment.prd_alignment: The gate improves reliability and auditability for policy-constrained autonomous delivery.
